# BLING Blue Team — Database
# Generated by Claude from spec. Updated as schema evolves.

## Engines

- **PostgreSQL 15** — transaction records, account metadata, fraud scores, alerts, feedback, audit trail
- **Neo4j Community 5.x** — live transaction graph (READ ONLY — built and owned by Graph Engine teammate)
- **Redis 7.x** — velocity counters (Tier 1), pre-computed graph feature cache (Tier 3 nightly batch)

Blue Team never writes to Neo4j. Ever.

---

## PostgreSQL Connection

```bash
# Dev
postgresql://user:password@localhost:5432/bling_blue

# Docker Compose internal
postgresql://${POSTGRES_USER}:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD}@postgres/bling_blue

# Test DB (separate from dev — always)
postgresql://user:password@localhost:5432/bling_blue_test
```

Env var: `POSTGRES_URL`

ORM: SQLAlchemy (models in `app/models/database.py`)
Migrations: Alembic (`alembic/versions/`)

---

## PostgreSQL Schema

### `accounts`
Synced from core banking. Blue Team reads only (CDC via Graph Engine teammate).

| Column | Type | Notes |
|--------|------|-------|
| `id` | VARCHAR(20) PK | Account number |
| `account_type` | VARCHAR(20) | SAVINGS, CURRENT, JAN_DHAN, INTERNAL, TREASURY, NOSTRO, VOSTRO |
| `kyc_occupation` | VARCHAR(100) | employer, gig_worker, farmer, merchant, etc. |
| `kyc_declared_income_monthly` | NUMERIC(15,2) | |
| `kyc_age` | INTEGER | |
| `kyc_home_state` | VARCHAR(50) | |
| `kyc_completeness_score` | FLOAT | 0.0-1.0 |
| `account_age_days` | INTEGER | |
| `is_merchant` | BOOLEAN | |
| `created_at` | TIMESTAMPTZ | |
| `updated_at` | TIMESTAMPTZ | |

### `transactions`
Append-only. Never UPDATE or DELETE.

| Column | Type | Notes |
|--------|------|-------|
| `id` | VARCHAR(36) PK | UUID |
| `account_id` | VARCHAR(20) FK→accounts | Sender |
| `payee_account_id` | VARCHAR(20) | Receiver (nullable — external) |
| `amount` | NUMERIC(15,2) | |
| `channel` | VARCHAR(10) | UPI, IMPS, RTGS, NEFT |
| `timestamp` | TIMESTAMPTZ | When transaction settled |
| `payee_vpa` | VARCHAR(100) | |
| `payee_vpa_created_at` | TIMESTAMPTZ | Age of payee VPA |
| `merchant_terminal_id` | VARCHAR(50) | Null for non-merchant txns |
| `merchant_mcc` | VARCHAR(10) | Merchant category code |
| `device_id` | VARCHAR(100) | |
| `ip_address` | INET | |
| `geo_city` | VARCHAR(50) | |
| `geo_state` | VARCHAR(50) | |
| `created_at` | TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW() | |

**Critical indexes:**
```sql
CREATE INDEX idx_transactions_account_timestamp ON transactions(account_id, timestamp DESC);
CREATE INDEX idx_transactions_payee ON transactions(payee_account_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_transactions_timestamp ON transactions(timestamp DESC);
```

### `fraud_scores`
One row per scored transaction. Written by the detection pipeline.

| Column | Type | Notes |
|--------|------|-------|
| `id` | BIGSERIAL PK | |
| `transaction_id` | VARCHAR(36) FK→transactions | |
| `score` | FLOAT | Final score 0.0-1.0 |
| `gate_fired` | VARCHAR(50) | NULL if no hard gate fired |
| `action` | VARCHAR(20) | PASS, LOG, REVIEW, HIGH_RISK |
| `tier1_score` | FLOAT | |
| `tier2_gate` | VARCHAR(50) | |
| `tier3_score` | FLOAT | NULL if exited before Tier 3 |
| `feature_vector` | JSONB | All 87 features — stored for audit |
| `shap_values` | JSONB | |
| `indian_context_applied` | JSONB | Context multipliers applied |
| `model_version` | VARCHAR(20) | |
| `processing_ms` | INTEGER | |
| `scored_at` | TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW() | |

### `alerts`
Created when score ≥ REVIEW threshold. Updated by investigator feedback.

| Column | Type | Notes |
|--------|------|-------|
| `id` | VARCHAR(36) PK | UUID |
| `transaction_id` | VARCHAR(36) FK→transactions | |
| `score` | FLOAT | |
| `gate` | VARCHAR(50) | |
| `status` | VARCHAR(20) | OPEN, UNDER_REVIEW, CONFIRMED_FRAUD, FALSE_POSITIVE |
| `evidence_package` | JSONB | Fund trail + SHAP + STR draft (filled async by Celery) |
| `trail_status` | VARCHAR(20) | PENDING, PROCESSING, COMPLETE, FAILED |
| `investigator_id` | VARCHAR(100) | |
| `investigator_decision` | BOOLEAN | NULL=pending, TRUE=fraud, FALSE=FP |
| `investigator_notes` | TEXT | |
| `blockchain_sealed` | BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE | |
| `red_team_notified` | BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE | |
| `created_at` | TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW() | |
| `updated_at` | TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW() | |

### `feedback_log`
Immutable record of every investigator decision — used for online learning.

| Column | Type | Notes |
|--------|------|-------|
| `id` | BIGSERIAL PK | |
| `alert_id` | VARCHAR(36) FK→alerts | |
| `transaction_id` | VARCHAR(36) | |
| `label` | INTEGER | 1=fraud, 0=false positive |
| `investigator_id` | VARCHAR(100) | |
| `model_version_at_feedback` | VARCHAR(20) | Which model version was active |
| `features_at_scoring` | JSONB | Feature vector at time of original scoring |
| `feedback_timestamp` | TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW() | |

### `graph_features_cache`
Pre-computed graph features updated nightly by APScheduler batch job.

| Column | Type | Notes |
|--------|------|-------|
| `account_id` | VARCHAR(20) PK FK→accounts | |
| `degree_centrality` | FLOAT | |
| `betweenness_centrality` | FLOAT | |
| `clustering_coefficient` | FLOAT | |
| `pagerank_fraud_seeded` | FLOAT | PageRank seeded from known fraud nodes |
| `community_id` | INTEGER | Louvain community |
| `community_fraud_ratio` | FLOAT | % of community that is flagged |
| `shortest_path_to_fraud` | INTEGER | Min hops to confirmed fraud account |
| `cycle_membership` | BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE | In any detected cycle? |
| `sink_score` | FLOAT | retention_ratio × inflow_concentration |
| `bipartite_score` | FLOAT | |
| `fan_out_ratio` | FLOAT | |
| `computed_at` | TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW() | Staleness check |

### `model_audit`
**IMMUTABLE — INSERT ONLY. No UPDATE. No DELETE. Ever.**
RBI PMLA Section 12 compliance — tamper-proof audit trail of every scoring decision.

| Column | Type | Notes |
|--------|------|-------|
| `id` | BIGSERIAL PK | |
| `event_type` | VARCHAR(50) | SCORE, FEEDBACK, RETRAIN, THRESHOLD_CHANGE |
| `transaction_id` | VARCHAR(36) | |
| `model_version` | VARCHAR(20) | |
| `event_data` | JSONB | Full decision context |
| `event_timestamp` | TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW() | |

**Immutability enforced by DB triggers:**
```sql
CREATE RULE no_update_audit AS ON UPDATE TO model_audit DO INSTEAD NOTHING;
CREATE RULE no_delete_audit AS ON DELETE TO model_audit DO INSTEAD NOTHING;
```

### `novelty_queue`
Developer review queue for Isolation Forest structural novelty findings.
**NOT immutable** — developers update `status` and `developer_notes` as they triage.
Created by migration `002_add_novelty_queue.py`.

| Column | Type | Notes |
|--------|------|-------|
| `id` | BIGSERIAL PK | |
| `transaction_id` | VARCHAR(36) UNIQUE | One entry per transaction (ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING) |
| `account_id` | VARCHAR(20) | Stored for developer use (pseudonymized in logs) |
| `anomaly_score` | FLOAT | IF `decision_function` output — more negative = more anomalous |
| `fraud_score` | FLOAT | XGBoost score at time of detection — developer context only, NEVER modified |
| `fraud_action` | VARCHAR(20) | PASS / LOG / REVIEW / HIGH_RISK — developer context only |
| `gate_fired` | VARCHAR(50) | Which Tier 2 gate fired, if any |
| `novelty_fingerprint` | VARCHAR(16) | SHA256[:16] of top-5 feature values — groups similar structural patterns |
| `fingerprint_occurrences` | INTEGER | Times this pattern appeared in the past 7 days (Redis counter) |
| `graph_features_snapshot` | JSONB | Full 17-feature vector at detection time |
| `requires_escalation` | BOOLEAN | True when `fingerprint_occurrences >= 10` → Red Team notified immediately |
| `status` | VARCHAR(30) | PENDING_REVIEW → REVIEWED_NORMAL / REVIEWED_NEW_FRAUD / NEW_GATE_ADDED |
| `developer_notes` | TEXT | Developer writes root cause / gate design notes |
| `created_at` | TIMESTAMPTZ | |
| `reviewed_at` | TIMESTAMPTZ | When developer marked reviewed |

**Status workflow:**
```
PENDING_REVIEW → REVIEWED_NORMAL      (legit unusual behavior — no action)
             → REVIEWED_NEW_FRAUD    (confirmed new pattern — write a Tier 2 gate)
             → NEW_GATE_ADDED        (gate written and deployed)
```

**Indexes:** `idx_novelty_status`, `idx_novelty_fingerprint`, `idx_novelty_escalation`, `idx_novelty_created`

**Developer API:**
- `GET /api/v1/novelty/queue?status=PENDING_REVIEW` — list queue (INTERNAL_KEY)
- `GET /api/v1/novelty/stats` — counts per status (INTERNAL_KEY)
- `PATCH /api/v1/novelty/{id}/review` — mark reviewed (INTERNAL_KEY)

---

## Redis Schema

| Key pattern | Type | Purpose | TTL |
|-------------|------|---------|-----|
| `vel:1h:{account_id}` | Counter (INCR) | Velocity count last 1 hour | 3600s |
| `vel:24h:{account_id}` | Counter (INCR) | Velocity count last 24 hours | 86400s |
| `vol:1h:{account_id}` | Counter (INCRBY amount) | Volume last 1 hour | 3600s |
| `feat:{account_id}` | Hash | Pre-computed 35 graph features | 86400s (refreshed nightly) |
| `model:weights` | Hash | Current ensemble weights | No TTL |
| `model:version` | String | Current model version string | No TTL |
| `novelty:fp:{fingerprint}` | Counter (INCR) | 7-day occurrence count per novelty fingerprint pattern | 604800s (7 days) |

---

## Neo4j Schema (Read-only — teammate owns)

Nodes: `Account`, `MerchantTerminal`
Edges: `(Account)-[:SENT {amount, channel, timestamp}]->(Account)`
       `(Account)-[:SENT {amount, channel, timestamp}]->(MerchantTerminal)`

All Tier 2 graph queries go through `app/graph/neo4j_client.py` with parameterized Cypher.

---

## Migration Commands

```bash
# Check current migration status
alembic current

# Run all pending migrations
alembic upgrade head

# Rollback last migration
alembic downgrade -1

# Create new migration (auto-detects SQLAlchemy model changes)
alembic revision --autogenerate -m "add_merchant_terminal_table"

# Show migration history
alembic history
```

---

## Rules

- Never run migrations on prod without testing rollback on a prod data copy first
- Every migration must have a `downgrade()` function — no one-way migrations
- Never edit a migration file after it has been committed and applied anywhere
- Never delete a column in the same migration that stops writing to it (deprecate first → stop writing → separate migration to drop)
- All PostgreSQL queries use parameterized statements (`%s` or named params). No f-strings in SQL. Ever.
- Transactions table is append-only. Application code must never UPDATE or DELETE transaction rows.
- model_audit table is INSERT-only. The DB trigger enforces this — do not try to work around it.

---

## Gotchas

**model_audit trigger silently swallows UPDATEs**: The `DO INSTEAD NOTHING` rule means UPDATE statements on `model_audit` succeed silently (exit code 0) but change nothing. If you expect an update to work, it will appear to succeed while doing nothing. Only INSERT.

**graph_features_cache staleness**: `computed_at` is the last nightly run. If a scoring session runs >24h after the last batch, features are stale. Check `computed_at` in `feature_builder.py` — if stale, fall back to real-time computation for critical features only.

**Neo4j connection pool exhaustion**: Neo4j Community Edition has a default max connection limit of 400. With Celery workers + API workers all querying Neo4j concurrently, pool exhaustion is possible under load. Set `max_connection_pool_size` in `neo4j_client.py` explicitly.

**Redis INCR and transaction ordering**: Redis INCR is atomic but if the API worker crashes mid-scoring, velocity counters may be incremented without a corresponding fraud_score row. This is acceptable (false high velocity temporarily) — do not try to make these transactional across Redis + PostgreSQL.
